chapter_title.en: Chapter 19 – Embalming the deceased and his enshrouding

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/315)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/315)
text: أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) نَهَى أَنْ يُوضَعَ عَلَى النَّعْشِ الْحَنُوطُ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Al Nowfaly, from Al Sakuny,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> that the Prophet<sup>saww</sup> forbade from places the embalming material (camphor) upon the coffin’.
en.sarwar: 16. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from al-Nawfaliy from al-Sakuniy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that the Holy prophet prohibited placing of hunut on a coffin.’”
